title: Packages and memberships.
subtitle: Define simple offers for each clinic. No payment processing is connected yet.
noClinic: This user needs to be assigned to a clinic before creating offers.
addPatientFirst: Add a patient first. Then return here to assign a package or membership.
createOfferFirst: Create an active offer first. Then assign it to a patient.
structureNoteTail: Later this can connect to Stripe, invoices, automated renewals, and patient portal payments.
